home.pageTitle: puriKRON — KRON Family Phase III Memecoin | Live Fair Launch on Base
home.eyebrow: KRON Family · Phase III · Demand-Gated · Base Network
home.subtitle: A community meme spin-off in the KRON Family — launched only on organic demand, never rushed or presold.
home.lead: puriKRON (PKRON) is a Phase III demand-gated KRON Family memecoin — an experimental community culture token following the same fair-launch standard as eKRON. Not investment promises.
home.warning: puriKRON is a high-risk experimental memecoin. No guaranteed price, liquidity, listing, utility, or returns. Informational only — not financial advice.
home.statusDesc: puriKRON (PKRON) fair-launched on Base on 2026-06-20. Official contract and timelocks are published in the on-chain registry.
home.aboutDesc1: puriKRON is a separate Phase III spin-off. eKRON remains the primary KRON Family gateway at www.ekron.network. Connected by brand — not the same asset.
home.aboutDesc2: A playful, speculative culture spin-off with high volatility and no guaranteed future value. Culture and community first — fair-launched on Base 2026-06-20.
home.launchDesc: puriKRON follows the KRON Fair Launch Standard — no presale, no private sale, 80/10/5/5 tokenomics on Base. Deployment waits for organic community demand, never rushed.
home.railInfraDesc: Sovereign infrastructure, AI, and ecosystem layers. Structured raises fund labs and protocol work — separate from KRON Family memecoins.
home.railCultureDesc: All 7 KRON tokens: no presale, no private sale, on-chain locks, standard tokenomics. puriKRON is Phase III — demand-gated.
home.tokenDesc: puriKRON (PKRON) on Base — 10B fixed supply, 80/10/5/5 fair launch with on-chain timelocks per the KRON Fair Launch Standard.
home.tokenAntiDump: Anti-dump: 14-day notice before locked allocation sales · max 10% per event. Address registry · Fair Launch Standard
home.onchainDesc: Official puriKRON (PKRON) contract, timelocks, and LP wallet on Base. Copy addresses only from this page.
home.familyDesc: Staggered rollout — eKRON gateway first, themed satellites, then demand-gated spin-offs including puriKRON. Never presale. Never a bundled family sale.
home.progDesc: The KRON Fair Launch Program is open-source Solidity on Base. Deploy any KRON Family token with standard 80/10/5/5 distribution and immutable timelocks — no presale logic, ever.
home.progOpenDesc: Smart contracts and launch tooling are published in the Launch Program. Review tokenomics and deployment steps on the program page.
home.riskDesc: puriKRON is experimental, speculative, and risky. No utility, market, liquidity, listing, or recoverable value is guaranteed.

faq.a1: No. puriKRON and all KRON Family memecoins follow the KRON Fair Launch Standard — no presale and no private sale, ever. Phase III spin-offs launch only on organic demand.
faq.a2: Seven independent experimental memecoins sharing a brand universe: eKRON, soviKRON, mineKRON, alviKRON, puriKRON, puppyKRON, and warpKRON. Each has its own contract and risk profile. See the full roster.
faq.q3: Is puriKRON the same as eKRON?
faq.a3: No. eKRON is the primary gateway at www.ekron.network. puriKRON is a separate Phase III demand-gated spin-off. Names are connected by brand family — they are not the same asset or contract.
faq.a4: Every KRON memecoin: 10B fixed supply, 80% fair-launch LP, 10% ecosystem (12-month lock), 5% founder (6-month lock), 5% founder (12-month lock). Enforced by on-chain timelocks via the launch program.
faq.q5: How do I verify the official contract?
faq.a5: Only trust addresses on the official verification page and announcements from www.purikron.com. Official PKRON contract: 0x679F06AC817a0EEC1fB86629168E40eb10b4A181. Do not use eKRON or any other contract.
faq.a6: puriKRON fair-launched on Base on 2026-06-20. Launch transaction: Blockscout. No presale, no private sale.
faq.a7: puriKRON is live on Base (EVM), chain ID 8453, following the KRON Fair Launch Standard. Always confirm you are on Base before interacting.
faq.q8: What is the official puriKRON contract address?
faq.a8: Official PKRON contract on Base: 0x679F06AC817a0EEC1fB86629168E40eb10b4A181. Verify on the verification page and BaseScan before interacting. Do not trust any other address.
faq.q9: How do I contact the puriKRON team?
faq.a9: Official project email: team@purikron.com. Only trust communications from official domains (purikron.com) and verified channels.
faq.q10: Is puriKRON financial advice or an investment?
faq.a10: No. puriKRON is an experimental memecoin for culture and community. This website is informational only — not financial, legal, or tax advice. You may lose all funds. DYOR.

consent.title: Legal Notice & Cookie Consent
consent.intro: puriKRON is a high-risk experimental memecoin live on Base mainnet. This website is informational only — not financial, legal, or tax advice. You must accept all policies below to access the homepage.
consent.cookiesDesc: We use essential functional storage (language preference, consent record). No advertising or third-party tracking cookies are deployed by this site.
consent.policiesDesc: By clicking Accept, you agree to all of the following:
consent.responsibilityDesc: You confirm that you understand puriKRON may lose all value, that you alone verify contract addresses and transactions, that you accept full responsibility for wallet security, and that you comply with all applicable laws and taxes in your jurisdiction.
consent.warning: Warning: Memecoins are extremely volatile. You can lose all funds. No guaranteed price, liquidity, listing, or returns.
consent.declineNote: You must accept to view the puriKRON homepage. Official (binding) legal language: English.
